dataChunk [ 2 * i + 1 ] = data [ 1 ] ; } byte [ ] [ ] filterKeys = new byte [ filteredValueCnt ] [ 2 ] ; for ( int k = 0 ; k < filteredValueCnt ; k ++ ) { filterKeys [ k ] = transferIntToByteArr ( 100 + k , dimColumnSize ) ;
